---
title: "Pre-processing"
output: html_document
---

Pre-processing of CITE-seq data
This Script is the first and will be used to pre-process SAM2 Provided data

```{r}

###############################################
#LOADING PACKAGE
###############################################

library("renv")
library("tidyverse")
library("Seurat")
library("SingleCellExperiment")
library("scater")
#library("scran") Bluster Dependencie doesnt install correctly
library('fields')
#library('modes') #Niet in CRan
library("dplyr")
library("stringr")
library("readr")


```



```{r}
#############################################
#RNA
############################################

rawData <- Read10X_h5("../Stage VIB/RawData/SAM2/filtered_feature_bc_matrix/")
rawDataRNA <- as.matrix(rawData$`Gene Expression`)



```
